description: This tutorial demonstrates how to create dynamic NFTs using the token extensions program on Solana. It covers minting NFTs, adding metadata, and saving data on-chain, illustrated through a beaver NFT example.
topic_summary: Learn to create dynamic NFTs with token extensions, including minting and metadata management [t=3:12 - t=3:76]. The tutorial showcases a beaver NFT that collects wood and saves data on-chain [t=47:34 - t=80:45].
